Request a demo

Camera & VMS

Your cameras don't just record. They act.

Every other compound security tool treats cameras as passive recorders. SYAG treats them as active sensors — camera events feed directly into your incident pipeline and can trigger automated responses the moment something happens.

See it live →

From camera to action in seconds

SYAG connects to your camera management system via WebSocket (LUNA / VisionLab). Events arrive in real time — no polling, no delays. When a motion detection alarm fires at 2am, SYAG knows instantly.

Supported camera events

  • Motion detection
  • Intrusion zone breach
  • Line crossing
  • ANPR (automatic number plate recognition) — flagged plates trigger alerts
  • Tamper detection
  • Video loss / camera offline
  • Custom event types from your VMS

Camera events → Incidents → Action

Camera events don't sit in a separate dashboard. They flow directly into SYAG's incident pipeline.

1. Camera detects motion in restricted zone at 02:14

2. SYAG creates an incident automatically: "Motion detected — Zone B perimeter"

3. Flow rule notifies the on-duty supervisor

4. Supervisor views the camera feed from the Operations Center and dispatches a guard

5. Guard acknowledges, investigates, and closes the incident with a report

6. Full audit trail logged — from camera trigger to resolution

This entire flow can be automated. Supervisors only intervene when the situation escalates.

One screen for everything — including your cameras

Operations Center operators access live camera feeds directly within SYAG.

  • View live feeds from any connected camera
  • Pull up the camera associated with any active incident in one click
  • Review recorded footage from incident timeline
  • Multi-camera view for control room operators

Know when a camera goes offline — before anyone else does

SYAG monitors the health of every connected camera continuously.

  • Camera status dashboard: online / offline / degraded
  • Offline duration tracking
  • Auto-alert to supervisor or maintenance team when camera goes down
  • History of camera health events per device

Connects with

Flow Automation Incident Management IoT Devices

See what it looks like when your cameras and operations work together.
